title: 4D/3N The Best of Shanghai Experience
details: Highlights: Shanghai Disneyland, Oriental Pearl Tower, The Bund, Nanjing Road, City God Temple, Xujiahui Catholic Church, Xuhui Library, Silk Museum, Jade Craft Exhibition Center, and Nanxiang Ancient Town. Enjoy a perfect blend of modern Shanghai, cultural heritage, and magical Disneyland adventure.

itinerary.day_details: Meet at NAIA for airline check-in and boarding. Flight: 5J678 MNL–PVG 08:35PM–12:05AM (+1). Arrival at Shanghai Airport, meet tour guide, hotel check-in, and rest.

Breakfast at hotel. Visit Oriental Pearl Tower (photo stop) and The Bund. Free shopping time at City God Temple and Nanjing Road Walkway. Visit Medicine Shop (minimum 2-hour stop). Dinner at local restaurant. Overnight in Shanghai.
Breakfast at hotel. Proceed to Shanghai Disneyland. Entrance tickets and transfers included. Enjoy rides, shows, and attractions. Return to hotel for overnight stay.

Breakfast at hotel. Visit Xujiahui Catholic Church, Xuhui Library, Silk Museum, and Nanxiang Ancient Town. Shopping tour at Jade Craft Exhibition Center (2-hour stop). Transfer to airport for departure. Flight: 5J679 PVG–MNL 01:35AM–05:55AM.

exclusions: Tipping for guide & driver ($20 per pax for whole trip)
extra_details: Prices are subject to availability and airfare changes.
Itineraries are subject to change without prior notice due to local circumstances.
